author.bio: M.S. CompSci. @caddyserver & @relicabackup. Member of the restored Church of Jesus Christ. Downvoted for opinions. Comes in second place, every time.
author.name: 🧗‍♂️ Matt Holt

content.text: Did you know: You can write ANY kind of server as a @caddyserver plugin with #golang and it will get free, automatic, on-by-default TLS with all certificates fully managed for you. Please take advantage of this! https://github.com/mholt/caddy/wiki/Writing-a-Plugin:-Server-Type
